projects.title: Music Player

projects.title: Fake URL Detector
projects.description: An intelligent security system that identifies deceptive and malicious URLs to protect users from phishing attacks.

projects.title: StudyBuddy
projects.description: An AI-powered academic assistant designed to streamline learning, organize study materials, and track student progress.

projects.title: Jumpy Game
projects.description: A fun 2D pixel-art platformer game featuring challenging levels, coin collection mechanics, and smooth character physics.

projects.title: Hire Sync
projects.description: A real-time campus placement management system with secure role-based dashboards and dynamic analytics.

experience.description: Led the UI/UX team for Flowbit, an all-in-one enterprise platform, and was promoted to Team Captain for leadership excellence. Applied design thinking and user-centric principles to build intuitive interfaces and streamline workflows.

Developed an AI-powered study assistant with syllabus-based explanations, summaries, and adaptive quizzes. Implemented intent routing, PDF-grounded responses, real-time quiz scoring, and secure API/session management.

Developed responsive front-end websites by converting UI designs into functional web pages. Implemented dynamic UI interactions and ensured cross-device compatibility. Completed 3 projects within the internship timeline.
